projectDescription: An agent-agnostic Claude Code skill that turns a single sentence into production-ready HTML prototypes, slide decks, motion animations, and infographics — using 20 design philosophies, brand asset protocols, and a complete MP4 export toolchain.
keyFeatures: 20 design philosophies across 5 schools (Pentagram, Field.io, Kenya Hara, Sagmeister, Takram, etc.)
Core Asset Protocol: 5-step brand asset gathering (logo, product shots, UI screenshots, colors, fonts)
Junior Designer workflow: assumptions + placeholders + early show before full execution
iOS/Android/macOS/Browser frame starter components for hi-fi prototypes
HTML → MP4 (25fps/60fps) + GIF export pipeline with BGM and SFX
HTML → editable PPTX via DOM-to-PowerPoint translation (real text frames, not images)
Design Direction Advisor fallback mode for vague briefs
5-dimension expert critique (philosophical coherence, visual hierarchy, craft, functionality, innovation)
Tweaks system for live parameter switching of design variants
Agent-agnostic: works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes
publicApiSurface: SKILL.md — main skill prompt read by agents
assets/animations.jsx — Stage + Sprite + useTime + useSprite + interpolate + Easing APIs
assets/ios_frame.jsx — IosFrame component with Dynamic Island/status bar/Home Indicator
assets/browser_window.jsx — browser window with URL bar component
assets/deck_stage.js — deck-stage web component for single-file HTML slide decks
assets/deck_index.html — multi-file deck assembler with iframe and keyboard navigation
scripts/export_deck_pptx.mjs — HTML deck → PPTX (image or editable mode)
scripts/html2pptx.js — DOM computedStyle → PowerPoint objects translator
references/design-styles.md — 20 design philosophies with prompt DNA
references/react-setup.md — React + Babel pinned versions and scope rules
